turns.text: Thanks for calling Riverside Dental, this is the front desk.
I wanted to ask about getting a filling.
Sure, I can schedule an appointment for you. What day works best?
Hmm, let me check my calendar and call back later.
No problem at all, talk soon.

findings.label: Opens with a branded greeting
findings.evidence: Thanks for calling Riverside Dental, this is the front desk.

findings.label: Offers to book an appointment
findings.evidence: Sure, I can schedule an appointment for you. What day works best?

findings.label: Appointment confirmed by customer
findings.explanation: Customer never confirmed — goal not reached.
